any_red_flags: CRITICAL: Brian Shultz LEFT Aurora in Jun 2025 — he is no longer at Aurora. He has been at an independent consulting firm since Aug 2025.
Outreach message targets him as 'you work in People there' — this is INCORRECT. Sending this message would be factually wrong and embarrassing.
The About section of his profile still has 'Aurora is hiring' link — may cause confusion but his current employer is clearly not Aurora.

hallucinated_references: LinkedIn message: 'I noticed you work in People there' — INCORRECT. Brian has not worked at Aurora since June 2025.

Email draft: 'I came across the Program Manager, People Team role at Aurora and wanted to reach out personally' addressed to Brian — sending this to him now would imply he's at Aurora, which he is not.
outreach_message_coherence.notes: Both outreach drafts are addressed to Brian Shultz as a current Aurora employee. This is factually wrong as of Aug 2025. DO NOT send either message to Brian as written.

final_recommendation.notes: URGENT REWRITE NEEDED. Primary target Brian Shultz has left Aurora. Outreach as drafted would reach a non-Aurora person and reference him incorrectly as 'working in People there.' Recommend: (1) retarget to Joshua Brooks with a rewritten message acknowledging he's on the payroll/finance side but asking if he can point Jamie to the right person on the People Programs team; OR (2) search LinkedIn for current Aurora 'People Programs' or 'HRBP' contacts directly. The role itself (PM, People Team) is confirmed active as of Jan 2026 on TealHQ and ZipRecruiter.
